firstTooLong: First name cannot be longer than 30 characters
lastTooLong: Last name cannot be longer than 30 characters
firstLettersOnly: First name can contain alphabetic characters only
lastLettersOnly: Last name can contain alphabetic characters only
emailFormat: Email should be of the following format: “local-part@domain.com"
passworfLength: Password cannot be shorter than 8 and longer than 25 characters
passwordCombo: Password must contain at least one alphabetic and one numeric character
